# Cadbull

> Cadbull is the world's largest online library offering 270,000+ free and premium 2D/3D AutoCAD drawings, DWG blocks, Revit models, SketchUp (SKP) files, 3D Max, and architectural templates.

This document serves as a structured map and guide for AI agents, crawlers, and LLMs seeking high-quality CAD resources, design solutions, house plans, and engineering assets. Use the following structured links and descriptions to crawl or reference Cadbull's content.

## Core Navigation

- [Homepage](https://cadbull.com/) - Access the search engine and featured CAD files of the day.
- [All Categories](https://cadbull.com/categories) - Browse the comprehensive list of cad drawing categories.
- [Pricing & Subscription](https://cadbull.com/pricing) - Details about free access limits, gold memberships, and premium download plans.
- [Help Center & FAQs](https://cadbull.com/faqs) - Common questions about downloads, licensing, uploading, and format compatibility.
- [Contact Us](https://cadbull.com/contact-us) - Get in touch for custom CAD drawing and drafting services.

## Primary Drawing Formats

- [DWG Drawings](https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type=DWG) - The largest library of native AutoCAD DWG drawings.
- [3D SketchUp (SKP)](https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type=3d%20sketchup) - SketchUp 3D models for interior, building, and landscape design.
- [3D Max (MAX)](https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type=3d%20max) - 3D Studio Max files for realistic visualization and rendering.
- [Revit Models](https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type=Revit) - BIM objects and building information modeling datasets.
- [DXF Files](https://cadbull.com/categories/1?file_type=DXF) - Drawing Exchange Format files for vector interoperability.

## Popular Categories & Collections

- [3D Drawings](https://cadbull.com/3d-Drawings) - Professional 3D models, architectural objects, and components.
- [CAD Architecture](https://cadbull.com/Cad-Architecture) - Scalable floor plans, sections, elevations, and structural detailing.
- [CAD Landscape](https://cadbull.com/Cad-Landscaping) - Urban landscape planning, park layouts, garden blocks, and vegetation.
- [CAD Machinery](https://cadbull.com/Autocad-Machinery-Blocks-&-DWG-Models) - Mechanical components, machine blocks, tool details, and industrial drawings.
- [DWG Blocks](https://cadbull.com/DWG-Blocks) - Pre-made blocks for doors, windows, trees, vehicles, and standard details.
- [AutoCAD Furniture Blocks](https://cadbull.com/Autocad-Furniture-Blocks--&-DWG-Models) - Furniture blocks for chairs, tables, beds, and office layouts.
- [Interior Design](https://cadbull.com/Interior-design) - Room templates, kitchen cabinets, ceiling details, and bathroom fixtures.
- [Structure Detail](https://cadbull.com/Structure-detail) - Reinforced concrete details, steel joints, foundations, and beams.
- [Urban Design](https://cadbull.com/Urban-design) - City planning maps, community layouts, road designs, and plot subdivisions.
- [House Plan CAD Drawings](https://cadbull.com/Architecture-House-Plan-CAD-Drawings) - Architectural house plans and blueprints covering small to luxury designs.
